data.title: Tether scores minority stake in Juventus, aims to integrate blockchain with sports
data.description:
Tether Investments announced a minority stake in Juventus Football Club. The move follows the unveiling of a long-term strategy designed to integrate digital assets, payment solutions, artificial intelligence, bitcoin mining, and biotech into traditional industries. The acquisition is part of a broader effort to expand the company’s portfolio beyond its flagship stablecoin, USDT, which...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/tether-scores-minority-stake-in-juventus-aims-to-integrate-blockchain-with-sports/

data.title: Top Coins to 100x as SEC Acknowledges First-Ever Dogecoin ETF Filing
data.description:
The SEC has acknowledged the filing of a new crypto ETF proposal by Grayscale. That’s the same asset management firm that filed a bid to create a Solana ETF just four days ago. However, this time around, the request is to create a Dogecoin ETF, which makes this the first attempt to launch a meme coin ETF under the pro-crypto Trump administration. Grayscale’s submission proposes to transform...
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/top-coins-to-100x-as-sec-acknowledges-first-ever-dogecoin-etf-filing/

data.title: Coinbase Partners with Aston Martin Saudi Aramco F1 Team
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase announced a brand partnership with the Aston Martin Saudi Aramco F1 team, and Coinbase will join as its exclusive cryptocurrency partner. It is reported that Coinbase is fully investing in cooperation with USDC, including Aston Martin Aramco as a Coinbase Prime customer and demonstrating the potential of using stablecoins for payments.

data.title: About 4.024 million TRIBE were transferred out of Binance, worth $2.08 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain data shows that about 5 minutes ago, 4,024,455.55608965 TRIBEs were transferred from the cryptocurrency exchange Binance, worth US$2,080,309.97.

data.title: SEC Discusses Crypto Asset Regulation With Industry Representatives
data.description: According to PANews, a meeting was held on February 5, 2025, between the staff of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's (SEC) Crypto Special Task Force and representatives from Jito Labs and Multicoin Capital Management. The discussion focused on addressing regulatory issues related to crypto assets. During the meeting, the representatives from Jito Labs and Multicoin Capital Management presented accompanying documents that were reviewed. The documents indicated that the meeting aimed to discuss two main topics: the feasibility of incorporating staking as a feature in Exchange-Traded Products (ETPs) and potential models for staking within certain crypto asset ETPs.

data.title: Jupiter Joint Creation: Jupnet technology preview and detailed technical overview expected in early April
U.S. SEC Cryptocurrency Working Group Meets with Jito Labs and Multicoin Capital Management Representatives
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. SEC Cryptocurrency Working Group met with representatives of Jito Labs and Multicoin Capital Management to discuss ways to address issues related to crypto asset regulation. It is reported that the topics discussed include: the ability to use pledge as a feature of exchange-traded products ("ETP") and potential models for pledge in certain crypto asset ETPs.

data.title: Binance upgrades token information disclosure mechanism to include unlocked tokens in circulation statistics
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance announced that it will upgrade the token information disclosure mechanism to include the token unlocking schedule, providing a more transparent and comprehensive perspective on market value and circulating supply. In this update, Binance introduced two dimensions: market value and unlocked market value to better reflect the financial situation of assets, while also distinguishing between circulating supply and unlocked circulating supply. Under the new method, the market value will be calculated by multiplying the circulation volume (including unlocked tokens) by the current price; if the unlocking data cannot be obtained, non-publicly accessible tokens will not be counted. Users can view the details of the token unlocking schedule for each project through the Binance website and App project overview section.
